response.step_by_step_log: Identified the song 'We are GAMERS !!!!' by the unit 'hololive GAMERS' (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone) using the on-screen text 'hololive GAMERS fes.' and a web search. Simplified the artist name to 'hololive GAMERS' for the search query. Used the following search string: '"We are GAMERS !!!!" hololive GAMERS Japanese and English lyrics'. Found both original and English translated lyrics. The entire video clip is a loop/single performance of this song.
response.global_summary: A single continuous performance clip featuring the Hololive GAMERS unit, with a static background image of the four members throughout. The music playing is the group's theme song, 'We are GAMERS !!!!'.

scenes.description: A static image of the Hololive GAMERS group (Shirakami Fubuki, Ookami Mio, Nekomata Okayu, Inugami Korone) with their theme song 'We are GAMERS !!!!' playing.

(G-A-M-E-R-S) We are GAMERS
(G-A-M-E-R-S) We are GAMERS

It's boring to just stay at home
